methodsAttempted.query: UCL University College London AI generative AI policy official site:ucl.ac.uk

methodsAttempted.notes: Tried 10 paths. /teaching-learning returned 200. Most other paths returned 404. /digital-education/generative-ai returned 502.

From /teaching-learning page, found link to /teaching-learning/generative-ai-hub. From the hub, found link to /genai-and-assessments sub-page. Tried additional sub-pages (using-ai-tools-in-assessment) which returned 404.

summary: UCL has a well-organized Generative AI Hub under /teaching-learning/generative-ai-hub/. Found 2 verified source candidates: the main GenAI hub and the GenAI assessments page with UCL's 3-category framework. Some sub-pages returned 404 or 502. Discovery path: path_expansion → link_traversal.
